mprAlignViews.Description: Alignment of views on project sheets
mprAlignViews.t1: Select the sheets whose views are to be aligned
mprAlignViews.t5: Select the viewports whose titles are to be aligned
mprAlignViews.t17: Viewport titles located approximately on the same horizontal line are aligned vertically to form a single row
mprAlignViews.mes2: No sheets with suitable views were found
